case_title: HOMERO VALDESPINO VS. AREVALO-MARCOS DENTAL CARE, INC.

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-22-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO-MARCOS DENTAL CARE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDESPINO, HOMERO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AREVALO-MARCOS DENTAL CARE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AREVALO-MARCOS DENTAL CARE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY VALDESPINO, HOMERO AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO-MARCOS DENTAL CARE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2011 - JUDGMENT.
